title: UISchema
description: UI Schema v1.0.0 — Framework-agnostic JSON interface description format for AI code generation

component.description: Component name, e.g. page / button / input / checkbox / table / form / dialog, etc.

meta.description: Semantic description, design intent, and constraint information (does not participate in rendering)

props.description: Component properties, directly mapped to the target component library's props

text.description: Unified text property, mapped to the target component's default slot

type.description: Component type, e.g. primary / default / success / warning / danger / info

size.description: Component size, see each framework's adaptation documentation for mapping rules

events.description: Component event bindings, key is event name, value is handler function name

bindings.description: Data bindings, key is binding target, value is data path

style.description: Visual appearance properties (Web frameworks use CSS, XAML frameworks use dependency properties)

layout.description: Component positioning rules within the parent container (Web uses Flex, XAML uses Grid/Panel properties)

justify-self.description: Self-alignment on the main axis (UISchema custom, non-standard CSS), AI should convert to margin-*: auto and other equivalent implementations

align-self.description: Self-alignment on the cross axis (standard CSS)
